role: Data access layer (DAO) for the ArchSpine SQLite database, providing CRUD operations for drift events, file metadata, symbols, token usage, and violations.
responsibility: Manages persistence and retrieval of all tracked data in ArchSpine, including semantic drift audits, file status, export symbol cache, token usage metrics, and architectural rule violations.

children.role: Infrastructure data access layer for semantic drift audit events, providing parameterized insertion and query functions over a SQLite database using better-sqlite3.
SQLite Data Access Object (DAO) providing file metadata persistence operations for the ArchSpine indexing system.
Infrastructure Data Access Object (DAO) providing CRUD operations for a SQLite symbol table used for export resolution.
Infrastructure Data Access Object (DAO) for persisting and querying token usage metrics in a SQLite database.
Infrastructure Data Access Object (DAO) encapsulating SQLite CRUD operations for architectural rule violation records.
